votes.reason: This aligns with my advocacy for hexagonal grid momentum physics and three-tier elevation while maintaining computational stability by rejecting paradoxical time mechanics.
Persistent limb damage creates meaningful strategic depth across rounds, and excluding mid-combat breeding preserves the combat flow I defended against animation-lock disruptions.
Firewalk mechanics and elemental adjacency puzzles provide skill-based positioning challenges superior to disorienting board rotations or chaotic magnetic forces.
Community-driven tools like the DNA Splicer and transparent AI analysis support the ecosystem's longevity better than physics simulations that compromise competitive clarity.
Restricting evolution to between-round intervals maintains combat pacing integrity while faction wars provide the meta-layer progression needed for seasonal engagement.
